label: Call LLM
description: Send a prompt (with {{variables}} from the row) to the local LaMini model (Xenova/LaMini-Flan-T5-783M). Response types: true/false, plain text, or text with feedback. Save the result to a row variable. With a project folder set, LaMini is saved under models/Xenova/ automatically (~820MB) or via scripts/download-lamini-model.sh.

defaultAction.prompt:
Based on the following, answer the question.

Content:
{{content}}

Question: Is this appropriate for our audience?

formSchema.label: Run only if (variable or {{key}}; skip when empty/falsy)
